note: New MVP work should use goal_schema.sessions. This task shape remains for migration from older timer/task records.
title: string
category: health | work | creative | relationships | home | finance | learning | personal | custom
label_id: uuid | null (foreign key to a user-defined Work Label; distinct from Goal life_area)

derived_server_computed.percent_complete: number (elapsed_minutes / time_allotted_minutes; never accepted from client submissions)
